screenshot_note: Code-only review this cycle. Prior visual captures from 18:22 session still valid — no layout changes deployed since.
fixed_since_last: prefers-reduced-motion — now has 18+ guards across both CSS files ✅
keyboard focus-visible rings on chars, cards, tabs ✅
skip-link and sr-only utility class added ✅

suggestions.title: localStorage JSON.parse crash in private/incognito browsing
suggestions.description: App.jsx line ~879: `const history = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : []` — no try-catch. If localStorage is corrupted or throws (Safari private mode, quota exceeded), the entire app crashes with a white screen. Wrap in try-catch with fallback. Same for theme preference read. This is a user-facing crash bug.

suggestions.title: Confetti only fires for first shipped worker in simultaneous completions
suggestions.description: App.jsx line ~833: `const worker = justShipped[0]` — ignores all other workers that shipped at the same time. If Carlos and Maya both finish in the same poll cycle, only Carlos gets celebrated. Fix: iterate justShipped and stagger confetti triggers by 200ms each.

suggestions.title: Module-level mutable _gradIdx counter breaks React StrictMode
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 3: `let _gradIdx = 0` — increments on every render, never resets. Breaks StrictMode double-invoke, hot reload, and SSR. Replace with useId() hook (React 18+) for stable unique SVG gradient IDs.

suggestions.title: Memoize reversed activity log slice
suggestions.description: The `[...entries].reverse().slice(0, 20)` allocation happens on every render (60s poll + state changes). Wrap in useMemo keyed on the activity array reference to eliminate unnecessary GC pressure.

suggestions.title: Add CSS containment to ambient particle containers
suggestions.description: 19 absolutely-positioned animated spans run continuously. Add `contain: strict` to .ambient-particles container so browser can skip layout/paint for offscreen particles. Consider reducing count to 8-10 — visual effect is equivalent.

suggestions.title: Wall clock drifts up to 59 seconds on mount
suggestions.description: Office.jsx starts `setInterval(() => setTime(new Date()), 60_000)` immediately. If mounted at :45 seconds, first update fires at next-minute:45, showing stale time. Sync to next minute boundary with initial setTimeout before starting the interval.

suggestions.title: Browser Notification API for error status alerts
suggestions.description: On-fire vibe is only visible in active tab. Add opt-in browser notifications when a worker enters 'error' status — useful for background monitoring. Gate behind a 🔔 toggle in header, persist preference in localStorage.

suggestions.title: Activity log export button (JSON/CSV)
suggestions.description: Add a small 'Export ↓' button that downloads the current activity array as JSON or CSV. Useful for retrospectives. Small Blob, big convenience.

suggestions.title: Establish z-index scale with CSS custom properties
suggestions.description: z-index values scattered ad-hoc (1, 2, 10, 50, 100, 200, 9999). Define --z-floor, --z-character, --z-overlay, --z-header, --z-modal, --z-toast in :root and replace all hard-coded values.

suggestions.title: Offline stale-while-revalidate caching
suggestions.description: If GitHub CDN is down, app shows error banner with nothing useful. Cache successful responses to localStorage with timestamp, fall back to cache if < 15 min old with 'Last updated X ago' indicator.

suggestions.title: Load Inter font explicitly via CDN
suggestions.description: Inter is declared in font-family but never loaded. On Linux/older Windows, silently falls back to system-ui causing inconsistent rendering. Add bunny.net font link (GDPR-safe) to index.html.
